creator: @sethgolie
transcript: Bro, I'm starving. You wanna go to Popeyes for lunch? Yeah, man, I'll get the five-piece blackened chicken tenders and then some green beans and a Coke Zero. Oh, wow, I would have never thought to order like that. Yeah, I've actually lost 20 pounds making food swaps like this. Damn, that's awesome. I got 20 pounds to lose myself. Where'd you learn that? My coach, Seth G, taught me everything he knows about fat loss. I'm gonna make sure to follow Seth G right now.
caption: Comment FASTFOOD for my FREE fast food swap cheat sheet. Next time you're at Popeyes order this: 5 blackened chicken tenders + green beans + Coke Zero (338 calories 45G protein). This order saves you well over 1000 calories and keeps you on track with your fitness journey. Follow @sethgolie for fast food swaps.

swaps.original_meal: Standard Popeyes meal (fried chicken, biscuit, fries, regular drink)
swaps.swap_meal: 5 blackened chicken tenders + green beans + Coke Zero

parsed.notes: Single restaurant swap (Popeyes only). Same skit format and same creator as positions 12-14. Caption says 338 cal but transcript says 5-piece (caption says 5 as well).
